title: AEP v1.1 F12 Recall Layer Index Entry
description: v1.1 F12 frontier-break primitive (EXPERIMENTAL pending redaction-replay legion per HV-1 closure). Single index-entry row inside the DERIVED projection layer at projects/v11-aep/publish-ready/aep/recall/. Six-agent convergence (scout+forge+scribe+judge+visual-judge+curator). Index entry materializes approximate-set-membership over the canonical 7-file corpus; canonical layer remains untouched per §V60-2 Axiom 4 + sec73.4 single-writer. Composes_with: sec02 truth-tags, sec41 HCRL, sec50 Law-3 multi-lens, sec73 ALL 6 SUBLAWS, v0.8 F1-F8, v1.0.3 RegexicalCue.

index_kind.description: Six-agent variant taxonomy: scout (touch_bloom), forge (compute_step_binding), scribe (cross_agent_cite_resolver), judge (rubric_dimension_histogram), visual-judge (viewport_screenshot_manifest), curator (teacher_threshold_precomputed), claim_type_columnar (default), source_reverse_citation (basis-graph reverse-walk).

indexed_packet_id.description: Canonical packet id the entry projects from.

indexed_packet_sha256.description: Tree-sha256 of indexed packet at rebuild time. Mismatch at query time = stale index = AEP11_F12_INDEX_STALE.

key_grain.description: Natural grain of the index key. claim_type_columnar=claim_id; cross_agent_cite_resolver=vec_id; etc.

key_value.description: The key value at this grain (e.g., a claim_id, a source_id, a vec_id token).

value_payload.description: Index-kind-specific payload. agent_touch_bloom = {bloom_filter_b64, hash_count, bit_count, expected_fpr}. claim_type_columnar = {column_name, column_value_canonical_json}. cross_agent_cite_resolver = {peer_agent, peer_lamport, peer_short_slug}. rubric_dimension_histogram = {bin_edges[], counts[], total}. viewport_screenshot_manifest = {pHash, dHash, aHash, image_path}. teacher_threshold_precomputed = {threshold_value, evidence_count, last_eval_at}.

rebuild_event_id.description: Reference into ops/events.jsonl: the append event that triggered this rebuild.

rebuild_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC when this entry was emitted.

redaction_replay_pending.description: v1.1 ships F12 with HV-1 contamination-flag PRESERVED. true = redaction-replay legion not yet run; convergence is contamination-flagged; truth-tag remains EXPERIMENTAL.

convergence_source_count.description: Number of independent legion agents that surfaced this index_kind. 6 for the canonical F12 ship.

convergence_lens_set.description: Canonical lens IDs that converged on this index_kind. Used for sec50 Law-3 anti-laundering audit.

contamination_flag.description: HV-1 contamination-flag block per legion synthesis sec7. F12 truth-tag remains EXPERIMENTAL until redaction_replay_pending=false.

fpr_target.description: Target false-positive rate for bloom-style indexes. Default 0.01.

query_latency_target_us.description: Target p99 query latency in microseconds. Operator target: <1000us (ms-NS recall). Default 1000.
